title: thermopsis californica var. semota
intro: Thermopsis californica var. semota, also known as California golden violet or mountain golden violet, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Thermopsis californica var. semota can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it is also sometimes used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
